Nyafia.name: Shot-Nyan Mode
Nyafia.desc: When activated, Nyafia will fire a shotgun at nearby enemies for a limited time. While in party, increases the player's shotgun damage by (10~35)%. (Does not stack)

Prunelia.name: Prayer for Abundant Harvest
Prunelia.desc: While at a base, Prunelia 's prayers bless the crops, increasing their harvest by (18~35)%.

Lapiron.name: Friend of Earth
Lapiron.desc: While in party, increases the player's Defense by (50~65)% while sprinting. (Does not stack)

Gildane.name: Sandstorm's Blessing
Gildane.desc: Can be ridden. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to Ground and increases Attack by (5~20)%.

Turtacle.name: Spikey Carrier
Turtacle.desc: While in party, reduces Ore weight by (80~100)%. (Does not stack)

Turtacle Terra.name: Shiny Hauler
Turtacle Terra.desc: While in party, reduces weight of Sulfur and Coal by (80~100)%. Also improves player's and Pals' Ground damage to enemy weak points by (80~100)%. (Does not stack)

Anubis.name: Guardian of the Desert
Anubis.desc: When activated, Anubis changes the player's attack type to Ground and increases Attack by (30~50)%. Occasionally evades attacks with a flash sidestep during battle.

Incineram.name: Flameclaw Hunter
Incineram.desc: When activated, attacks the targeted enemy with Hellfire Claw. When this Pal uses Hellfire Claw, it has a x(1.1~2.5) damage multiplier.

Incineram Noct.name: Darkclaw Hunter
Incineram Noct.desc: When activated, attacks the targeted enemy with Nightmare Claw. When this Pal uses Nightmare Claw, it has a x(1.1~2.5) damage multiplier.

Mau.name: Gold Digger
Mau.desc: Sometimes digs up Gold Coin when assigned to Ranch.

Mau Cryst.name: Icy Whispers
Mau Cryst.desc: Sometimes drops Ice Organ when assigned to Ranch.

Rushoar.name: Hard Head
Rushoar.desc: Can be ridden. While mounted, increases efficiency of destroying Stone by (500~2000)%.

Lifmunk.name: Lifmunk Recoil
Lifmunk.desc: When activated, leaps onto the player's head and uses a submachine gun to follows up player attacks.

Tocotoco.name: Eggbomb Launcher
Tocotoco.desc: When activated, equips to the player and transforms into an egg launcher.

Eikthyrdeer.name: Guardian of the Forest
Eikthyrdeer.desc: Can be ridden. Can perform a double jump while mounted and increases lumbering efficiency by (220~500)%.

Eikthyrdeer Terra.name: Guardian of the Golden Forest
Eikthyrdeer Terra.desc: Can be ridden. Can perform a double jump while mounted. While at a base, increases the Lumbering Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1 (Does not stack)

Digtoise.name: Drill Crusher
Digtoise.desc: When activated, enters the Shell Spin state. Follows the player while spinning, increasing ore mining efficiency by (800~2000)%.

Galeclaw.name: Galeclaw Glider
Galeclaw.desc: While in party, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Enables high-speed gliding and allows shooting with the right hand.

Grizzbolt.name: Yellow Tank
Grizzbolt.desc: Can be ridden. Can rapidly fire a minigun while mounted.

Teafant.name: Soothing Shower
Teafant.desc: While in party, restores (20~40)% of the player's Health when Health falls below 30%. (Does not stack) (120-second cooldown after activation)

Direhowl.name: Direhowl Rider
Direhowl.desc: Can be ridden. Moves slightly faster than most mounts.

Gorirat.name: Full-Power Gorilla Mode
Gorirat.desc: When activated, unleashes a primal fury that increases Gorirat 's Attack by (75~300)% for a limited time.

Gorirat Terra.name: Full-Power Gorilla Pound
Gorirat Terra.desc: While in party, increases the player's climbing speed by (50~100)%. (Does not stack)

Jolthog.name: Jolt Bomb
Jolthog.desc: When activated, equips Jolthog to the player to be thrown at an enemy, causing an Electric explosion upon impact.

Jolthog Cryst.name: Cold Bomb
Jolthog Cryst.desc: When activated, equips Jolthog Cryst to the player to be thrown at an enemy, causing an Ice explosion upon impact.

Univolt.name: Swift Deity
Univolt.desc: Can be ridden. While in party, improves player's and Pals' Electric damage to weak points by (25~40)%. (Does not stack)

Univolt Cryst.name: Frigid Deity
Univolt Cryst.desc: Can be ridden. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to Ice and increases Attack by (5~20)%.

Foxparks.name: Huggy Fire
Foxparks.desc: When activated, equips to the player and transforms into a flamethrower.

Bristla.name: Princess Gaze
Bristla.desc: While in party, increases Attack of Grass Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack)

Lunaris.name: Antigravity
Lunaris.desc: While in party, spheres home in on Pals, and carrying capacity increases by (300~600). (Does not stack)

Pengullet.name: Pengullet Launcher
Pengullet.desc: When activated, the player equips a Rocket Launcher to fire Pengullet as ammunition. Pengullet explodes on impact and is incapacitated.

Pengullet Lux.name: Pengullet Lux Launcher
Pengullet Lux.desc: When activated, the player equips Pengullet Lux to fire Rocket Launcher as ammunition. Pengullet Lux explodes on impact and is incapacitated.

Dazzi.name: Lady of Lightning
Dazzi.desc: While in party, appears near the player. Attacks hostile enemies with Electric bolts. These bolts will not reduce the target's Health below 1.

Gobfin.name: Angry Shark
Gobfin.desc: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Aqua Gun. When this Pal uses Aqua Gun, it has a x(1.1~2.5) damage multiplier. While in party, increases the player's Attack by (10~20)%.

Gobfin Ignis.name: Angry Shark
Gobfin Ignis.desc: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Spirit Fire. When this Pal uses Spirit Fire, it has a x(1.1~2.5) damage multiplier. While in party, increases the player's Attack by (10~20)%.

Lamball.name: Fluffy Shield
Lamball.desc: When activated, equips to the player and becomes a shield. Sometimes drops Wool when assigned to Ranch.

Jormuntide.name: Stormbringer Sea Dragon
Jormuntide.desc: Can be ridden to travel on water. While in party, increases player's and Pals' damage to enemies afflicted with Soak by (50~65)%. (Does not stack)

Jormuntide Ignis.name: Stormbringer Lava Dragon
Jormuntide Ignis.desc: Can be ridden. While in party, nullifies lava damage and increases player's and Pals' damage to enemies afflicted with Burn by (50~65)%. (Does not stack)

Loupmoon.name: Dark Gleam Strike
Loupmoon.desc: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Jumping Claw. When this Pal uses Jumping Claw, it has a x(1.1~2.5) damage multiplier. While in party, increases the player's melee weapon attack speed by (15~30)%. (Does not stack)

Hangyu.name: Flying Trapeze
Hangyu.desc: While in party, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Enables slow ascension while gliding.

Hangyu Cryst.name: Winter Trapeze
Hangyu Cryst.desc: While in party, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Enables slow ascension while gliding.

Suzaku.name: Wings of Flame
Suzaku.desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount. This Pal’s Movement Speed increases by (5~25)% for each other Fire Pal in your party. (Excluding Suzaku)

Suzaku Aqua.name: Wings of Water
Suzaku Aqua.desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount. This Pal’s Movement Speed increases by (5~25)% for each other Water Pal in your party. (Excluding Suzaku Aqua)

Pyrin.name: Red Hare
Pyrin.desc: Can be ridden. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to Fire and increases Attack by (5~20)%.

Pyrin Noct.name: Black Hare
Pyrin Noct.desc: Can be ridden. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to Dark and increases Attack by (5~20)%.

Elphidran.name: Amicable Holy Dragon
Elphidran.desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While flying, Movement Speed is increased. While in party, Dark Pals drop (40~80)% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)

Elphidran Aqua.name: Amicable Water Dragon
Elphidran Aqua.desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While flying, Movement Speed is increased. While in party, player and party Pals take (15~30)% less Fire damage and are immune to Burn. (Does not stack)

Woolipop.name: Candy Pop
Woolipop.desc: Sometimes drops Cotton Candy when assigned to Ranch. While at a base, reduces Hunger depletion rate of Base Pals by (-10~-20)%. (Does not stack)

Woolipop Terra.name: Bitter Pop
Woolipop Terra.desc: Sometimes drops Caramel Cotton Candy when assigned to Ranch. While at a base, reduces Hunger depletion rate of Base Pals by (-15~-25)%. (Does not stack)

Cryolinx.name: Dragon Hunter
Cryolinx.desc: While in party, Dragon Pals drop (40~80)% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)

Melpaca.name: Pacapaca Wool
Melpaca.desc: Can be ridden. While in party, increases Kingpaca 's Defense and Movement Speed. Sometimes drops Wool when assigned to Ranch.

Surfent.name: Swift Swimmer
Surfent.desc: Can be ridden to travel on water. Sometimes drops Leather when assigned to Ranch.

Surfent Terra.name: Sand Swimmer
Surfent Terra.desc: Can be ridden. While in party, the player's attacks inflict Muddy (2~6). (Does not stack)

Cawgnito.name: Eerie Nightstreaker
Cawgnito.desc: When activated, grants Night Vision to see in dark places. Activate again to turn off. Sometimes digs up Bone when assigned to Ranch.

Azurobe.name: Waterwing Dance
Azurobe.desc: Can be ridden to travel on water. While mounted, changes the player's attack type to Water and increases Attack by (5~20)%.

Azurobe Cryst.name: Icewing Dance
Azurobe Cryst.desc: Can be ridden to travel on water. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to Ice and increases Attack by (5~20)%.

Cattiva.name: Cat Helper
Cattiva.desc: While in party, Cattiva helps carry supplies, increasing the player's max carrying capacity by (100~200). (Does not stack)

Depresso.name: Caffeine Inoculation
Depresso.desc: When activated, Depresso chugs an entire energy drink, increasing its Movement Speed and Work Speed by (100~900)%. Sometimes drops Venom Gland when assigned to Ranch.

Fenglope.name: Wind and Clouds
Fenglope.desc: Can be ridden. Can double jump while mounted.

Reptyro.name: Ore-Loving Beast
Reptyro.desc: Can be ridden. While in party, reduces weight of all types of ore by (30~60)%. (Does not stack)

Reptyro Cryst.name: Ice-Loving Beast
Reptyro Cryst.desc: Can be ridden. While in party, reduces weight of all types of ore by (35~65)%. (Does not stack)

Maraith.name: Messenger of Death
Maraith.desc: Can be ridden. While in party, all Party Pals' Active Skill cooldowns are reduced by (30~60)% whenever you defeat an enemy. (Does not stack)

Robinquill.name: Grounded Archer
Robinquill.desc: While in party, increases the player's bow damage by (10~35)%. (Does not stack)

Robinquill Terra.name: Master Archer
Robinquill Terra.desc: While in party, increases the player's bow charge speed by (15~30)%. (Does not stack)

Relaxaurus.name: Hungry Missile
Relaxaurus.desc: Can be ridden. Can rapidly fire a missile launcher while mounted.

Relaxaurus Lux.name: Missile Party
Relaxaurus Lux.desc: Can be ridden. Can rapidly fire a missile launcher while mounted.

Kitsun.name: Wolf of the Sun
Kitsun.desc: Can be ridden. While in party, player and party Pals take (15~30)% less Ice damage and are immune to Freeze. (Does not stack)

Leezpunk.name: Too Cool to be Seen
Leezpunk.desc: When activated, Leezpunk and the player become invisible, making them undetectable to enemies for (10~20) seconds.

Leezpunk Ignis.name: Too Cool to be Seen
Leezpunk Ignis.desc: When activated, Leezpunk Ignis and the player become invisible, making them undetectable to enemies for (10~20) seconds.

Fuack.name: Surfing Slam
Fuack.desc: When activated, Fuack body surfs towards an enemy and slams into them.

Fuack Ignis.name: Fire Tackle
Fuack Ignis.desc: When activated, Fuack Ignis fire surfs towards an enemy and slams into them.

Vanwyrm.name: Aerial Marauder
Vanwyrm.desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While in party, increases damage player deals to enemy weak points by (20~40)%. (Does not stack)

Vanwyrm Cryst.name: Aerial Marauder
Vanwyrm Cryst.desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While in party, increases damage player deals to enemy weak points by (30~50)%. (Does not stack)

Chikipi.name: Egg Layer
Chikipi.desc: Sometimes lays an Egg when assigned to Ranch.

Dinossom.name: Fragrant Dragon
Dinossom.desc: Can be ridden. While in party, increase Defense of Dragon Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack)

Dinossom Lux.name: Thunder Dragon
Dinossom Lux.desc: Can be ridden. While in party, increases Defense of Electric Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack)

Sparkit.name: Static Electricity
Sparkit.desc: While in party, increases Attack of Electric Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops Electric Organ when assigned to Ranch.

Frostallion.name: Icy Steed
Frostallion.desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, changes the player's attack type to Ice, inflict Freeze (2~6), increases Attack by (10~40)%.

Frostallion Noct.name: Black Steed
Frostallion Noct.desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, changes the player's attack type to Dark, inflict Blind (2~6), increases Attack by (10~40)%.

Mammorest.name: Gaia Crusher
Mammorest.desc: Can be ridden. While mounted, increases logging efficiency by (220~500)% and mining efficiency by (500~2000)%.

Mammorest Cryst.name: Ice Crusher
Mammorest Cryst.desc: Can be ridden. While mounted, increases logging efficiency by (220~500)% and mining efficiency by (500~2000)%.

Felbat.name: Life Steal
Felbat.desc: While fighting together, grants the player and Felbat a life steal effect that restores (5~9)% of damage dealt as Health.

Broncherry.name: Love's First Blossom
Broncherry.desc: Can be ridden. While in party, Pal Eggs you pick up have a (35~45)% chance of becoming an Alpha Pal Egg. (Does not stack)

Broncherry Aqua.name: Purity's Full Bloom
Broncherry Aqua.desc: Can be ridden. While in party, Pal Eggs you pick up have a (45~55)% chance of becoming an Alpha Pal Egg. (Does not stack)

Faleris.name: Scorching Predator
Faleris.desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While in party, Ice Pals drop (40~80)% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)

Blazamut.name: Magma Kaiser
Blazamut.desc: Can be ridden. While in party, increases the Attack and Defense of the Pal fighting alongside you by (5~10)% whenever you defeat an enemy. This effect lasts 20 seconds and stacks up to five times.

Blazamut Ryu.name: Dragon Kaiser
Blazamut Ryu.desc: Can be ridden. While in party, improves player's and Pals' Dragon damage to enemy weak points by (25~40)%. (Does not stack)

Caprity.name: Berry Picker
Caprity.desc: Sometimes drops Red Berries from its back when assigned to Ranch. While in party, restores (100~200) Pal’s Hunger to the Pal with the lowest Hunger every 5 minutes. (Does not stack)

Reindrix.name: Cool Body
Reindrix.desc: Can be ridden. While in party, the player gains Heat Resistance +2. (Does not stack)

Shadowbeak.name: Modified DNA
Shadowbeak.desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While flying, Movement Speed is increased. Enhances Dark attacks by (15~30)% while mounted.

Sibelyx.name: Silk Shroud
Sibelyx.desc: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Blizzard Spike. When this Pal uses Blizzard Spike, it has a x(1.1~2.5) damage multiplier. Sometimes makes High Quality Cloth when assigned to Ranch.

Sibelyx Primo.name: Gilded Shroud
Sibelyx Primo.desc: While in party, increases Defense of Neutral Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack) Sometimes makes High Quality Cloth when assigned to Ranch.

Vixy.name: Dig Here!
Vixy.desc: Sometimes digs up items from the ground when assigned to Ranch.

Wixen.name: Lord Fox
Wixen.desc: When activated, Wixen changes the player's attack type to Fire and increases Attack by (30~50)%.

Wixen Noct.name: Black Fox Lord
Wixen Noct.desc: When activated, Wixen Noct changes the player's attack type to Dark and increases Attack by (30~50)%.

Lovander.name: Heart Drain
Lovander.desc: While fighting together, grants the player and Lovander a life steal effect that restores (5~9)% of damage dealt as Health.

Hoocrates.name: Dark Knowledge
Hoocrates.desc: While in party, increases Attack of Dark Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack)

Kelpsea.name: Aqua Spout
Kelpsea.desc: While in party, increases Attack of Water Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops Aquatic Pal Fluids when assigned to Ranch.

Kelpsea Ignis.name: Lava Spout
Kelpsea Ignis.desc: While in party, increases Attack of Fire Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops Flame Organ when assigned to Ranch.

Killamari.name: Fried Squid
Killamari.desc: While in party, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Enables gentle floating while gliding for an extended time.

Killamari Primo.name: Fried Killamari
Killamari Primo.desc: While in party, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Enables gentle floating while gliding for an extended time.

Mozzarina.name: Milk Maker
Mozzarina.desc: Sometimes drops Milk when assigned to Ranch.

Wumpo.name: Guardian of the Snowy Mountain
Wumpo.desc: Can be ridden. While at a base, increases the Transporting Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)

Wumpo Botan.name: Guardian of the South
Wumpo Botan.desc: Can be ridden. While in party, player and party Pals take (15~30)% less Ground damage and are immune to Muddy status. (Does not stack)

Vaelet.name: Purification of Gaia
Vaelet.desc: While in party, Ground Pals drop (40~80)% more items when defeated. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops various seeds when assigned to Ranch.

Nitewing.name: Travel Companion
Nitewing.desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount.

Flopie.name: Helper Bunny
Flopie.desc: While in party, appears near the player. Automatically picks up nearby items.

Lyleen.name: Harvest Goddess
Lyleen.desc: When activated, the queen's soothing graces restore the Health of the player and Party Pals by (80~90)%.

Lyleen Noct.name: Goddess of the Tranquil Light
Lyleen Noct.desc: When activated, the queen's soothing graces restore the Health of the player and Party Pals by (85~95)%.

Elizabee.name: Queen Bee Command
Elizabee.desc: This Pal's Attack increases by (12~24)% for each Beegarde in party.

Beegarde.name: Worker Bee
Beegarde.desc: While in party, increases Elizabee 's Attack. Sometimes drops Honey when assigned to Ranch.

Tombat.name: Ultrasonic Sensor
Tombat.desc: When activated, uses ultrasonic waves to detect nearby dungeons, treasure chests, and scrap.

Mossanda.name: Grenadier Panda
Mossanda.desc: Can be ridden. Can rapidly fire a grenade launcher while mounted.

Mossanda Lux.name: Grenadier Panda
Mossanda Lux.desc: Can be ridden. Can rapidly fire a grenade launcher while mounted.

Arsox.name: Warm Body
Arsox.desc: Can be ridden. While in party, the player gains Cold Resistance +2. (Does not stack)

Rayhound.name: Lightning Shepherd
Rayhound.desc: Can be ridden. Can perform a double jump while mounted. This Pal’s Movement Speed increases by (5~25)% for each other Electric Pal in your party. (Excluding Rayhound)

Rayhound Cryst.name: Snow Shepherd
Rayhound Cryst.desc: Can be ridden. Can perform a double jump while mounted. While in party, increases Defense of Ice Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack)

Fuddler.name: Mining Assistance
Fuddler.desc: While in party, improves player mining efficiency by (30~60)% and reduces Stone weight by (80~100)%. (Does not stack)

Astegon.name: Black Ankylosaur
Astegon.desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount. Increases the damage dealt to ores by (1100~3300)%, and you can obtain (150~300)% more Ore while mounted.

Verdash.name: Grassland Gymnast
Verdash.desc: While in party, grants 1 additional jump and 1 additional mid-air dash. (Does not stack)

Foxcicle.name: Aurora Guide
Foxcicle.desc: While in party, increases Attack of Ice Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops Ice Organ when assigned to Ranch.

Jetragon.name: Aerial Missile
Jetragon.desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount. Can rapidly fire a missile launcher while mounted.

Daedream.name: Dream Chaser
Daedream.desc: While in party, appears near the player. Attacks hostile enemies with Dark magic bullets. These bullets will not reduce the target's Health below 1.

Tanzee.name: Cheery Rifle
Tanzee.desc: When activated, Tanzee will mercilessly fire an assault rifle at nearby enemies for a limited time.

Tanzee Ignis.name: Chipper Chimp Gunfire
Tanzee Ignis.desc: When activated, Tanzee Ignis will mercilessly fire a Fire assault rifle at nearby enemies for a limited time.

Blazehowl.name: Hellflame Lion
Blazehowl.desc: Can be ridden. While in party, Grass Pals drop (40~80)% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)

Blazehowl Noct.name: Darkflame Lion
Blazehowl Noct.desc: Can be ridden. While in party, Neutral Pals drop (40~80)% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)

Kingpaca.name: King of Muscles
Kingpaca.desc: Can be ridden. This Pal's Defense and Movement Speed increase by (5~14)% for each Melpaca in party.

Kingpaca Cryst.name: Coldhearted King
Kingpaca Cryst.desc: Can be ridden. This Pal's Defense and Movement Speed increase by (5~14)% for each Melpaca in party.

Gumoss.name: Logging Assistance
Gumoss.desc: While in party, improves logging efficiency by (30~50)% and reduces weight of all types of wood by (40~60)%. (Does not stack)

Swee.name: Fluffy
Swee.desc: While in party, increases Attack and Defense of Sweepa.

Sweepa.name: King of Fluff
Sweepa.desc: Can be ridden. This Pal's Attack and Defense increase by (12~24)% for each Swee in party.

Katress.name: Mystical Black Magic
Katress.desc: While in party, Neutral Pals drop (40~80)% more items when defeated. Also has a (10~50)% chance to prevent Pal Sphere consumption when thrown. (Does not stack)

Katress Ignis.name: Blazing Black Magic
Katress Ignis.desc: While at a base, increases the Kindling Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)

Ribbuny.name: Happy-Go-Lucky Bunny
Ribbuny.desc: While in party, increases Attack of Neutral Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack) While at a base, increases the Handiwork Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)

Beakon.name: Thunderous
Beakon.desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, changes the player's attack type to Electric and increases Attack by (5~20)%. This Pal’s Movement Speed increases by (5~25)% for each other Electric Pal in your party. (Excluding Beakon)

Beakon Cryst.name: Coldsnap
Beakon Cryst.desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, changes the player's attack type to Ice and increases Attack by (5~20)%. This Pal’s Movement Speed increases by (5~25)% for each other Ice Pal in your party. (Excluding Beakon Cryst)

Warsect.name: Cast-Iron Shell
Warsect.desc: While in your party, generates a barrier around the player after 5 melee hits are landed within (5~9) seconds. (Does not stack)

Warsect Terra.name: Fullmetal Shell
Warsect Terra.desc: While in your party, generates a barrier around the player after 5 melee hits are landed within (5~9) seconds. (Does not stack)

Paladius.name: Holy Knight of the Firmament
Paladius.desc: Can be ridden. Can triple jump while mounted. Activate Spear Thrust to have Necromus stay by your side and attack enemies in tandem.

Nox.name: Kuudere
Nox.desc: When activated, detects the location of nearby Pal Effigies.

Penking.name: Brave Sailor
Penking.desc: While in party, Fire Pals drop (40~80)% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)

Penking Lux.name: Unyielding Storm Commander
Penking Lux.desc: While in party, improves player's and Pals' Water damage to enemy weak points by (25~40)%. (Does not stack)

Chillet.name: Wriggling Weasel
Chillet.desc: Can be ridden. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to Dragon and increases Attack by (5~20)%.

Chillet Ignis.name: Sparkling Weasel
Chillet Ignis.desc: Can be ridden. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to Fire and increases Attack by (5~20)%.

Quivern.name: Sky Dragon Affection
Quivern.desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While in party, increases Attack of Dragon Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack)

Quivern Botan.name: Grass Dragon Affection
Quivern Botan.desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to Grass and increases Attack by (5~20)%.

Helzephyr.name: Wings of Death
Helzephyr.desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to Dark and increases Attack by (5~20)%.

Helzephyr Lux.name: Wings of Thunder
Helzephyr Lux.desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to Electric and increases Attack by (5~20)%.

Ragnahawk.name: Flame Wing
Ragnahawk.desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to Fire and increases Attack by (5~20)%.

Bushi.name: Brandish Blade
Bushi.desc: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Iaigiri. When this Pal uses Iaigiri, it has a x(1.1~2.5) damage multiplier.

Bushi Noct.name: Void Blade
Bushi Noct.desc: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Iaigiri. When this Pal uses Iaigiri, it has a x(1.1~2.5) damage multiplier. While in party, increases the player's melee weapon damage by (30~65)% but only when not in combat. (Does not stack)

Celaray.name: Zephyr Glider
Celaray.desc: While in party, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Prevents fall damage and extends the duration of high-speed gliding.

Celaray Lux.name: Jolt Glider
Celaray Lux.desc: While in party, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Prevents fall damage and extends the duration of high-speed gliding.

Necromus.name: Dark Knight of the Abyss
Necromus.desc: Can be ridden. Can double jump while mounted. When Twin Spears skill is activated, a Paladius in your party will appear and attack alongside you.

Petallia.name: Blessing of the Flower Spirit
Petallia.desc: When activated, soothing blossoms restore the player's Health by (75~85)%. While at a base, increases the Planting Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)

Petallia Ignis.name: Passion of the Flower Spirit
Petallia Ignis.desc: When activated, soothing blossoms restore the player's Health by (80~90)%. While in party, player and party Pals take (15~30)% less Grass damage, and are immune to Ivy-Covered. (Does not stack)

Grintale.name: Glaring Cat's Eye
Grintale.desc: Can be ridden. While in party, picking up a Pal Egg has a (50~75)% chance of receiving one extra. (Does not stack)

Cinnamoth.name: Mysterious Scales
Cinnamoth.desc: When activated, attacks the targeted enemy with Poison Fog. While at a base, increases the Farming Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)

Menasting.name: Steel Scorpion
Menasting.desc: While in party, player's Defense increases by (5~10)%, and Electric Pals drop (40~80)% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)

Menasting Terra.name: Golden Scorpion
Menasting Terra.desc: While in party, player's Defense increases by (5~10)%, and Electric Pals drop (40~80)% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)

Orserk.name: Ferocious Thunder Dragon
Orserk.desc: While in party, hitting an enemy with a bullet increases the Attack and Defense of the Pal fighting alongside you by (1~5)% for 5 seconds. This effect stacks up to 30 times. (Does not stack.)

Cremis.name: Fluffy Wool
Cremis.desc: While in party, increases Attack of Neutral Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops Wool when assigned to Ranch.

Dumud.name: Soil Improver
Dumud.desc: While in party, increases Attack of Ground Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops High Quality Pal Oil when assigned to Ranch.

Dumud Gild.name: Golden Harvest
Dumud Gild.desc: While in party, increases amount of Gold Coin dropped by enemies by +(100~200)%. Sometimes drops High Quality Pal Oil when assigned to Ranch, with a small chance to drop Gold Coin. (Does not stack)

Flambelle.name: Magma Tears
Flambelle.desc: While in party, recovers Health of the player and Party Pals by (0.1~0.5)% per second outside of combat. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops Flame Organ when assigned to Ranch.

Rooby.name: Tiny Spark
Rooby.desc: While in party, increases Defense of Fire Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops Flame Organ when assigned to Ranch.

Bellanoir.name: Nightmare Iris
Bellanoir.desc: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Nightmare Ray. When this Pal uses Nightmare Ray, it has a x(1.1~2.5) damage multiplier.

Bellanoir Libero.name: Nightmare Stare
Bellanoir Libero.desc: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Nightmare Bloom. When this Pal uses Nightmare Bloom, it has a x(1.1~2.5) damage multiplier.

Selyne.name: Celestial Darkness
Selyne.desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, enhances Neutral and Dark attacks by (15~30)%.

Croajiro.name: Leap Stance
Croajiro.desc: When activated, Croajiro Noct channels its loyalty and puffs up its abdomen to store energy. Climbing on top will propel the player high into the air. While airborne before landing, the player's Attack is increased by (50~86)%.

Croajiro Noct.name: Shadow Stance
Croajiro Noct.desc: When activated, Croajiro Noct channels its loyalty and puffs up its abdomen to store energy. Climbing on top will propel the player high into the air. While in party, improves player's and Pals' Dark damage to enemy weak points by (25~40)%. (Does not stack)

Lullu.name: Floral Boost
Lullu.desc: While at a base, Lullu fills farms with good spirits, increasing the growth rate of the crops by (50~70)%.

Shroomer.name: Rampant Spores
Shroomer.desc: Can be ridden. Sometimes drops Mushroom or Cavern Mushroom when assigned to Ranch.

Shroomer Noct.name: Roiling Spores
Shroomer Noct.desc: Can be ridden. While at a base, its mysterious spores slow the rate at which the SAN value of allies at the base decreases by (10~15)%.

Kikit.name: Sandball Soccer
Kikit.desc: While in party, increases Defense of Ground Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack)

Sootseer.name: Grave Robber
Sootseer.desc: While in party, player and party Pals take (15~30)% less Neutral damage. (Does not stack) Sometimes digs up Bone when assigned to Ranch.

Prixter.name: Phantom Venom
Prixter.desc: While in party, increases player's and Pals' damage to enemies afflicted with Poison by (50~65)%. (Does not stack)

Prixter Lux.name: Scorpion Longwave
Prixter Lux.desc: When activated, Prixter Lux changes the player's attack type to Electric and increases Attack by (30~50)%.

Knocklem.name: Steel Guardian Mode
Knocklem.desc: When activated, a steel resolve increases Knocklem 's Attack by (50~200)% and Defense by (50~200)% for a limited time.

Knocklem Ignis.name: Iron Guardian Mode
Knocklem Ignis.desc: When activated, a steel resolve increases Knocklem Ignis 's Attack by (60~210)% and Defense by (60~210)% for a limited time.

Yakumo.name: Birds of a Feather
Yakumo.desc: Can be ridden. While fighting together, (15~30)% increased chance of encountering pals with the same Passive Skill as this Pal. (Excludes certain Passive Skills)

Dogen.name: Homeward Prayer
Dogen.desc: When activated, teleports to the nearest base. Cannot be used inside dungeons or similar areas.

Dazemu.name: Sand Sprint
Dazemu.desc: Can be ridden. Movement Speed is increased by (50~100)% while mounted on sand.

Mimog.name: Master of Unlocking
Mimog.desc: While fighting together, Mimog can open treasure chests without using a key.

Xenovader.name: Unknown Invader
Xenovader.desc: While in party, increases the damage of the last bullet fired from a full-auto weapon by (100~160)%. (Does not stack)

Xenogard.name: Unknown Intruder
Xenogard.desc: Can be ridden. While in party, increases the player's energy weapon damage by (10~35)%. (Does not stack)

Moldron.name: Magma Overload
Moldron.desc: Can be ridden as a mount. This Pal's Attack increases by (4~8)% for each other Fire or Ground Pal in your party.

Moldron Cryst.name: Ice Overload
Moldron Cryst.desc: Can be ridden. While in party, improves player's and Pals' Ice damage to enemy weak points by (25~40)%. (Does not stack)

Xenolord.name: Meteor Wings
Xenolord.desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While in party, damage done by Partner Skills of weapon-wielding Pals increases by (20~50)%. (Does not stack)

Nitemary.name: Soul Collector
Nitemary.desc: While fighting together, Pals drop +(100~200)% more Pal Souls when defeated. (Does not stack)

Nitemary Botan.name: Soul Binder
Nitemary Botan.desc: While in party, increases Defense of Grass Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack)

Starryon.name: Night Dancer
Starryon.desc: Can be ridden. Boosts jumping ability while mounted. This Pal's movement speed increases by +(50~100)% at night.

Starryon Primo.name: Light Dancer
Starryon Primo.desc: Can be ridden. Boosts Jump Power while mounted. This Pal’s Movement Speed increases by (5~25)% for each other Neutral Pal in your party. (Excluding Starryon Primo)

Silvegis.name: Aegis Shield
Silvegis.desc: Can be ridden. While in party, reduces shield regeneration delay by (30~60)% and reduces damage taken by your shield by (65~80)%. (Does not stack)

Smokie.name: Dig, Smokie! Dig!
Smokie.desc: When activated, uses its sharp sense of smell to detect nearby Chromite. While fighting together, Chromite acquisition increases by +(100~200)%.

Smokie Cryst.name: Cryo Instincts
Smokie Cryst.desc: While at a base, increases the Cooling Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)

Celesdir.name: Blessing of Purification
Celesdir.desc: Can be ridden. This Pal's Attack and Movement Speed increases by (2~6)% for each other Neutral Pal in your party. When in party, recovers Health of the player and Party Pals by (0.15~0.75)% per second. (Does not stack)

Celesdir Noct.name: Blessing of Chaos
Celesdir Noct.desc: Can be ridden. While in party, the Pal fighting alongside you gradually loses Health in exchange for (40~80)% Attack increase. (Does not stack)

Panthalus.name: Resonant Guardian
Panthalus.desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount. Only 1 can be summoned to a base. While at a base, it constantly patrols the skies and bombards intruders from high above.

Omascul.name: Masquerade Dance
Omascul.desc: While in party, increases Party Pals' EXP gained by (40~80)%. (Does not stack)

Hoodle.name: Void-Dweller
Hoodle.desc: While in party, increases the player's damage dealt to enemies that are not in combat by (50~100)%. (Does not stack)

Sekhmet.name: Desert Empress
Sekhmet.desc: While at base, boosts Anubis 's work speed by (20~40)%. Increases efficiency by (30~60)% if Sekhmet is also working at a Workbench, Workshop, or other related facilities. (Does not stack)

Slowatt.name: Chillswitch
Slowatt.desc: While in party, when the player attacks an enemy afflicted with Electrify, the enemy discharges electricity, dealing damage equal to (40~60)% of the player's attack damage to nearby enemies. (Does not stack.)

Splatterina.name: Blade of Uncontrolled Passion
Splatterina.desc: While in party, the amount of items obtained from using the Meat Cleaver increases by (100~200)%. (Does not stack)

Tarantriss.name: Tarantriss’ Web
Tarantriss.desc: Can be ridden. Can double jump while mounted. Additionally, can shoot spider web to grapple and move at high speed.

Azurmane.name: Plasma Dash
Azurmane.desc: Can be ridden. Grants Air Dash, to move at even higher speeds.

Pierdon.name: Power Stone
Pierdon.desc: While in party, increases player's and Pals' damage to enemies afflicted with Muddy by (50~65)%. (Does not stack)

Pierdon Cryst.name: Power Crystal
Pierdon Cryst.desc: While in party, player and party Pals take (15~30)% less Dragon damage. (Does not stack)

Gloopie.name: Sticky Princess
Gloopie.desc: While in party, the capture gauge decreases (12~35)% more slowly while the bars are not overlapping during the fishing minigame. (Does not stack)

Gloopie Primo.name: Cephalo-Princess
Gloopie Primo.desc: While in party, increases Defense of Water Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack)

Whalaska.name: Chilled Whale Cruiser
Whalaska.desc: Can be ridden. While in party, fishing minigames start with the capture gauge increased by (5~14)%. Additionally, while the bars overlap, capture progress increases by (5~14)%. (Does not stack)

Whalaska Ignis.name: Cozy Whale Cruiser
Whalaska Ignis.desc: Can be ridden. While in party, fishing minigame begins with the capture gauge (7~17)% higher than usual, and capture progress increases by (7~17)% while the bars overlap. (Does not stack)

Jelliette.name: Jelliette Drop
Jelliette.desc: While in party, increases items obtained from fishing by (55~95)%. While Jelliette and Jellroy are in your base, Jelliette 's watering speed increases by (50~120)%. (Does not stack)

Foxparks Cryst.name: Huggy Frost
Foxparks Cryst.desc: When activated, equips to the player and attacks using frigid air.

Caprity Noct.name: Venom Picker
Caprity Noct.desc: Sometimes drops Venom Gland from its back when assigned to Ranch. While in party, restores (100~200) Pal’s Hunger to the Pal with the lowest Hunger every 5 minutes. (Does not stack)

Ribbuny Botan.name: Ground 'n' Pound
Ribbuny Botan.desc: While in party, improves player's and Pals' Grass damage to enemy weak points by (25~40)%. (Does not stack) Increases efficiency by (200~400)% when working at a Weapon Workbench, Weapon Assembly Line, or other related facilities.

Loupmoon Cryst.name: Frozen Gleam Strike
Loupmoon Cryst.desc: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Snow Claw. When this Pal uses Snow Claw, it has a x(1.1~2.5) damage multiplier. While in party, increases the player's melee weapon attack speed by (15~30)%. (Does not stack)

Kitsun Noct.name: Gloomhowl
Kitsun Noct.desc: Can be ridden. While in party, player and party Pals take (15~30)% less Dark damage and are immune to Blind. (Does not stack)

Dazzi Noct.name: Lady of Dark Lightning
Dazzi Noct.desc: While in party, appears near the player. Attacks hostile enemies with Dark bolts. These bolts will not reduce the target's Health below 1.

Cryolinx Terra.name: Explosive Strength
Cryolinx Terra.desc: While in party, when attacking enemy weak point, increases the power of the next weak point attack by (30~60)%. (Does not stack)

Fenglope Lux.name: Stormcloud
Fenglope Lux.desc: Can be ridden. Can double jump while mounted. While in party, Water Pals drop (40~80)% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)

Faleris Aqua.name: Tidal Predator
Faleris Aqua.desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While in party, Fire Pals drop (40~80)% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)

Bastigor.name: Blizzard Crash
Bastigor.desc: Can be ridden. While mounted, delivers crushing blows with a hammer forged from Ice.

Venusa.name: Snake's Sagacity
Venusa.desc: While in party, the player's attacks inflict Blind (2~6). (Does not stack)

Ghangler.name: Master of Darkness
Ghangler.desc: Can be ridden to travel on water. This Pal’s Movement Speed increases by (5~25)% for each other Dark or Water Pal in your party. (Excluding Ghangler)

Ghangler Ignis.name: Abyssal Celebrity Chef
Ghangler Ignis.desc: Can be ridden to travel on water. This Pal’s Movement Speed increases by (5~25)% for each other Fire or Water Pal in your party. (Excluding Ghangler Ignis)

Icelyn.name: Witch's Icy Veil
Icelyn.desc: When activated, Icelyn changes the player's attack type to Ice and increases Attack by (30~50)%.

Dupin.name: Trick-Loving Fluffle
Dupin.desc: While in party, when the player's Health falls below 50%, Dupin generates an explosion around the player (Fire / Power: (100~200) / Burn buildup: 777). Additionally, while the player's Health is below 50%, the player's Attack is increased by (30~50)%. (Does not stack)

Hartalis.name: Sacred Barrier
Hartalis.desc: Can be ridden. While mounted, it generates a barrier that blocks all attacks. Can triple jump while mounted.

Herbil.name: Herbil Pulse
Herbil.desc: While in party, Herbil uses its healing powers to restore (30~60)% of the player's Max Health when incapacitated.

Snugloo.name: Invisible Eye
Snugloo.desc: While in party, reduces the chance of being detected by enemies. (Does not stack)

Munchill.name: Icy Maw
Munchill.desc: While in party, reduces the weight of ingredient and food by (30~60)%. When paired with another Ice Pal, their Rot Speed also reduces by (-30~-80)%. (Does not stack)

Needoll.name: Hug Me Please
Needoll.desc: While in party, increases player's and Pals' damage to enemies afflicted with Ivy-Covered by (50~65)%. (Does not stack)

Needoll Noct.name: Hug You So Much
Needoll Noct.desc: While in party, the player's attacks inflict Ivy-Covered (2~6). (Does not stack)

Mycora.name: Charming Spore
Mycora.desc: While at a base, increases the Medicine Production Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)

Finsider.name: Water Gun
Finsider.desc: When activated, Finsider changes the player's attack type to Water and increases Attack by (30~50)%.

Finsider Ignis.name: Ember Chamber
Finsider Ignis.desc: While in party, Finsider Ignis helps carry supplies, reducing the weight of weapons in your inventory by (60~100)%. Also improves player's and Pals' Fire damage to enemy weak points by (25~40)%. (Does not stack)

Flaracle.name: Burning Future
Flaracle.desc: While in party, when the player attacks an enemy afflicted with Burn, the enemy explodes, dealing damage equal to (40~60)% of the player's attack damage to nearby enemies. (Does not stack.)

Polapup.name: Rider of the Snowy Mountain
Polapup.desc: Can be ridden. Movement Speed is increased by (80~160)% while mounted on snow. Can also slide quickly down slopes.

Polapup Terra.name: Snowy Mountain Slider
Polapup Terra.desc: Can be ridden. Movement Speed is increased by (80~160)% while mounted on snow. Can also slide quickly down slopes. While it starts out slow, the top speed it can hit while sliding is no joke.

Clovee.name: Happy Clover
Clovee.desc: While at a base, increases the Gathering Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)

Puffolt.name: Crackle Booster
Puffolt.desc: While at a base, increases the Generating Electricity Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)

Wispaw.name: Death-Cheating Feline
Wispaw.desc: While in party, increases the capture rate when awarded a back bonus. (Does not stack)

Roujay.name: Dark-Nester
Roujay.desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While in party, increases player's and Pals' damage to enemies afflicted with Blind by (50~65)%. (Does not stack)

Bakemi.name: Grinning Death
Bakemi.desc: While in party, attacking enemies afflicted with Poison reduces their Attack by (40~80)%. (Does not stack)

Braloha.name: Balmy Weather
Braloha.desc: Can be ridden. While in your base, increases the egg production speed of Pals assigned to Breeding Farm by (20~50)%. (Does not stack)

Palumba.name: Samba Step
Palumba.desc: Can be ridden. Movement Speed is increased by (155~240)% while mounted on grass.

Dualith.name: Forest Laser
Dualith.desc: Can be ridden. When activated, Dualith fires a powerful Grass laser from its right hand.

Dualith Noct.name: Corruption Laser
Dualith Noct.desc: Can be ridden. When activated, Dualith Noct fires a powerful Dark laser from its right hand.

Frostplume.name: Peacock Pounce
Frostplume.desc: While in party, Frostplume 's icy aura sharpens focus, increasing the player's reload speeds by (20~50)%. (Does not stack)

Tetroise.name: Masonry Archelon
Tetroise.desc: Can be ridden While at a base, increases the Mining Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)

Tetroise Primo.name: Stone-Chaser Archelon
Tetroise Primo.desc: Can be ridden. While in party, increases the durability of all weapons and armor by (80~100)%. (Does not stack)

Valentail.name: Big Stretch
Valentail.desc: While in party, reduces the effects of gravity on the player, making them more floaty while jumping and falling. (Does not stack)

Jellroy.name: Jellroy Drop
Jellroy.desc: While in party, increases items obtained from salvaging by (55~95)%. While Jelliette and Jellroy are in your base, Jellroy 's watering speed increases by (50~120)%. (Does not stack)

Dynamoff.name: Electro-Massage Incubation
Dynamoff.desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While at a base, shortens the time it takes to incubate eggs by (20~40)%. (Does not stack)

Wistella.name: Hidden Dark Energy
Wistella.desc: While in party, increases Defense of Dark Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack)

Pupperai.name: Best Boy
Pupperai.desc: While in party, increases the player's melee weapon damage by (10~35)%. (Does not stack)

Neptilius.name: Sentinel of the Great Sea
Neptilius.desc: While in party, it follows up the player's attacks with Water spear strikes. Can be ridden to travel on water. While mounted, it can leap high into the air over water.

Skutlass.name: Fish Fillet
Skutlass.desc: When activated, Skutlass becomes the player's katana (Attack: (2600~3900)). If it does not revert to its normal form quickly, Skutlass will become incapacitated. It will also become incapacitated if Iaigiri is used.

Skutlass Ignis.name: Seared Fish Fillet
Skutlass Ignis.desc: When activated, Skutlass Ignis becomes the player's katana (Attack: (2900~4200)). If it does not revert to its normal form quickly, Skutlass Ignis will become incapacitated. It will also become incapacitated if Iaigiri is used.

Green Slime.name: Slime Body
Green Slime.desc: Can be ridden. Can jump high into the air while mounted.

Blue Slime.name: Slime Body
Blue Slime.desc: Can be ridden. Can jump high into the air while mounted.

Red Slime.name: Slime Body
Red Slime.desc: Can be ridden. Can jump high into the air while mounted.

Purple Slime.name: Slime Body
Purple Slime.desc: Can be ridden. Can jump high into the air while mounted.

Illuminant Slime.name: Slime Body
Illuminant Slime.desc: Can be ridden. Can jump high into the air while mounted.

Rainbow Slime.name: Slime Body
Rainbow Slime.desc: Can be ridden. Can jump high into the air while mounted.

Enchanted Sword.name: Enchant
Enchanted Sword.desc: While in party, Dark Pals drop (40~80)% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)

Cave Bat.name: Bat Backup
Cave Bat.desc: While in party, appears near the player. Automatically picks up nearby items.

Illuminant Bat.name: Bat Backup
Illuminant Bat.desc: While in party, appears near the player. Automatically picks up nearby items.

Eye of Cthulhu.name: Mad Eye Lunge
Eye of Cthulhu.desc: When activated, Eye of Cthulhu charges and attacks targeted enemy.

Demon Eye.name: Demonic Sight
Demon Eye.desc: While in party, increases Attack of Dark Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack)

Gildra.name: Resurrection
Gildra.desc: While fighting together, when Gildra is incapacitated, it revives with its Hunger reduced to 0.

Solmora.name: Charming Fish
Solmora.desc: Can be ridden to travel on water. While in party, makes it easier to fish up talented Pals. (Does not stack)

Solmora Lux.name: Shocking Fish
Solmora Lux.desc: Can be ridden to travel on water. While mounted, changes the player's attack type to Electric and increases Attack by (5~20)%. While in party, makes it easier to fish up talented Pals. (Does not stack)

Solenne.name: Untainted Maiden
Solenne.desc: While in party, increases the player's Attack by (30~80)% if all Pals in party are different species. (Does not stack)

Snock.name: Charging Shell
Snock.desc: While in party, the player's attacks inflict Electrify (2~6). (Does not stack)

Snock Lux.name: Grounding Shell
Snock Lux.desc: While in party, player and party Pals take (15~30)% less Water damage, and are immune to Soak. (Does not stack)

Loomen.name: Lantern Enchantment
Loomen.desc: While in party, the player's arrows explode on contact, dealing additional damage equal to (15~30)% of the player's attack damage. (Does not stack)

Bulldosu.name: Yokozuna's Presence
Bulldosu.desc: Can be ridden. While in party, player and party Pals take (15~30)% less Electric damage and are immune to Electrify. (Does not stack)

Carnibora.name: Entangling Tongue
Carnibora.desc: While in party, when the player performs a dodge roll or dodge step, Carnibora creates a whirlwind that deals damage to enemies it touches (Grass / Power: (40~80)). (Does not stack)

Muffly.name: Fluffy Flutterer
Muffly.desc: While in party, increases the capture rate of Pals afflicted with Freeze. (Does not stack)

Souffline.name: Fuzzy Fairy
Souffline.desc: While in party, increases the capture rate of Pals afflicted with Ivy-Covered. (Does not stack)

Amione.name: Magical Twin Powers
Amione.desc: While at a base, increases the Watering Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)

Majex.name: Phantasmal Arcana
Majex.desc: While in party, when the player attacks an enemy afflicted with Burn, the enemy creates flames around itself, dealing continuous damage equal to (15~30)% of the player's attack damage to enemies that come into contact with them. (Does not stack.)

Tropicaw.name: Flower Dance
Tropicaw.desc: While in party, extends the invincibility period during dodge rolls and dodge steps by (15~30)%. (Does not stack)

Lapure.name: Long-Sleeved Hurray
Lapure.desc: While in party, reduces the Partner Skill cooldowns for other party Pals by (10~50)%. (Does not stack)

Ophydia.name: Glorious Mist
Ophydia.desc: Can be ridden. While in party, the player's attacks inflict Soak (2~6). (Does not stack)

Shaolong.name: Azure Sovereign
Shaolong.desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount. This Pal's Attack increases by (4~8)% for each other Dragon Pal in your party.

Leafan.name: Selfless Discipline
Leafan.desc: This Pal's Attack and Defense increase by (2~6)% for each other Grass Pal in your party.

Elgrove.name: Mother Nature's Menace
Elgrove.desc: When activated, Elgrove changes the player's attack type to Grass and increases Attack by (30~50)%.

Elgrove Cryst.name: Father Winter's Threat
Elgrove Cryst.desc: While in party, grants the player the ability to Freeze enemies afflicted with Soak in one strike.

Silvance.name: Spore Stalwart
Silvance.desc: While in party, when the player attacks an enemy afflicted with Ivy-Covered, the enemy explodes, dealing additional damage equal to (40~60)% of the player's attack damage. (Does not stack) Also grants immunity to the World Tree's Explosive Spores to both the player and their Pals.

Eidrolon.name: Liberated Pterosaur
Eidrolon.desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount. This Pal's Attack and Movement Speed increase by (2~6)% for each other Dragon or Dark Pal in your party.

Eidrolon Ignis.name: Resentful Pterosaur
Eidrolon Ignis.desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount. This Pal's Attack and Movement Speed increase by (2~6)% or each other Dragon or Fire Pal in your party. (Excluding Eidrolon Ignis)

Dandilord.name: Mist Stalwart
Dandilord.desc: When activated, the player's attacks inflict Poison (2~6). While in party, grants the player and party Pals immunity to Poison, and nullifies the effects of toxic gas in the World Tree area. (Does not stack)

Renjishi.name: Stage Combat
Renjishi.desc: While in party, the player's attacks inflict Burn (2~6). (Does not stack)

Aegidron.name: Indestructible Fortress
Aegidron.desc: Can be ridden. While in party, player and party Pals take (60~80)% less damage from explosive attacks, and are immune to Stun. (Does not stack)
